docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALDEMAN, GEORGE W. AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, LORI MAXWELL, KENNETH E. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXWELL, KENNETH E.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXWELL, LORI ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, KENNETH E.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, KENNETH E.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALDEMAN, GEORGE W. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-05-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-11-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

2:45 P.M.JURY ROOM PETER N. FOWLER, PRO TEM. C/C FOR SETTLMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES AND PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFT. LORI MAXWELL SHALL VACATE THE SUBJECT PREMISE AT 1029 GEARY APT. #5 S.F. CA. BY 2:00 P.M. ON 5/14/93. PLTF. SHALL RETURN THE SECURITY DEPOSTIT OF $350.00 TO DEFT. LORI MAXWELL. FURTHER PLTF. AGREES TO WAIVE ALL PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES IF THE DEFT. VACATES THE SUBJECT PREMISE BY 5/14/93 AT 2:00 P.M. (PAST DUE RENT THROUGH 5/31/93 IS $1,500.00) THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS THAT THE BOTH PARTIES AMY HAVE AGAINST EACH OTHER AS A RESULT OF THE LANDLORD TENANT RELATIONSHIP HEREIN. DETF. AGREES TO REMOVE ALL PERSONAL PROPERTY FROM THE SUBJECT PREMISE EXCEPT THE T.V. SET THAT BELONGS TO THE PLAINTIFF. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES.
ADDED TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DISMISSAL CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION DISPOSITION CALENDAR OF MAY-05-1993, DISMISSAL
